title: The Wanderer
description:
Short DescriptionThe Wanderer is a 2D post-apocalyptic survival game where every new world tells a different story. Create your survivor, build your camp, explore a random wasteland map, find loot, meet traders, fight hostiles, train a loyal pet, and survive with casual, hardcore, or custom difficulty modifiers.

About This GameThe world is broken. Your camp is small. Your supplies are limited.

The Wanderer is a 2D pixel-art survival game set in a ruined post-apocalyptic wasteland. Create your own survivor, choose your past life, and begin a new journey across a dangerous world filled with unknown locations, scarce resources, hostile encounters, traders, loot, and unexpected events.

Each new game creates a fresh map to explore, meaning every run can lead to different discoveries, different dangers, and different survival stories. One journey might start with a desperate search for food and water. Another might lead you straight into a hostile fight, an abandoned house, or a loyal dog waiting in the wasteland.

Survival is about choices. Do you enter the house or leave it alone? Do you risk a long expedition with low supplies? Do you spend your resources now or save them for later? Do you play casually, go hardcore, or create your own custom challenge with world modifiers?

The wasteland changes. Your survivor changes. Your story changes.

Create Your WandererStart each run by creating your own survivor. Choose your appearance, name your character, and select a past life that shapes how your journey begins.

Your survivor is more than just a name on the screen — they are your story in the wasteland.

Build a Life at CampYour camp is your base in a world that wants you dead. Rest, recover, manage supplies, plan your next move, and prepare before heading back into the unknown.

Food, water, health, storage, carry weight, fuel, danger, and time all matter. Staying alive means watching your resources and knowing when to return before it is too late.

Explore a New Map Every TimeEvery new world gives you a different wasteland to explore. Travel across the map, discover unknown points of interest, and choose where your next expedition will take you.

Some locations may hold useful loot. Some may hide danger. Some may change the course of your entire run.

Search Locations and Make ChoicesArrive at abandoned houses, ruined places, camps, and mysterious locations. Sometimes nobody is inside. Sometimes something is waiting.

You decide what to do.

Leave safely, enter and search, risk your supplies, or push deeper into danger for the chance of better rewards.

Find and Train a PetThe wasteland can be lonely, but you may find a loyal companion along the way.

Look after your pet, feed and care for it, train it, and send it out to gather supplies. A good pet can help you survive longer, fight harder, and make the end of the world feel a little less empty.

Fight HostilesNot everyone survived the end of the world with good intentions.

Face hostile survivors and dangerous encounters in turn-based battles. Your survivor, your pet, your gear, and your choices all matter when a fight breaks out.

Sometimes fighting is the only option. Sometimes surviving means knowing when not to.

Traders, Loot, and SuppliesSearch the wasteland for useful items, resources, weapons, food, water, and supplies. Meet traders and decide what is worth buying, selling, or saving.

The right item at the right time can keep you alive for another day.

Game Modes and Difficulty ModifiersPlay the way you want.

Choose a more relaxed casual experience, take on a harsher hardcore survival challenge, or customise the world with difficulty modifiers that change how the wasteland behaves.

Adjust the challenge, replay with different rules, and create a survival experience that fits the kind of run you want.

ReplayabilityNo two journeys are the same.

With random maps, different characters, past lives, pets, traders, loot, hostile encounters, game modes, and world modifiers, The Wanderer is built around replaying, experimenting, and creating new survival stories each time you start again.

One survivor may build a safe camp and thrive.

Another may enter the wrong house and never come back.

Key Features• Create and customise your own survivor

• Choose a past life that shapes your start

• Explore a new wasteland map every run

• Build up your camp and manage supplies

• Search abandoned locations for loot

• Find, care for, and train a loyal pet

• Meet traders and discover useful items

• Fight hostile survivors and dangerous threats

• Play casual, hardcore, or custom difficulty modes

• Use world modifiers to change the challenge

• Replay with new maps, new risks, and new survival stories

Wishlist The WandererThe wasteland is waiting.

Add The Wanderer to your wishlist and prepare to create your survivor, train your pet, explore a new world, and survive the end one choice at a time.
description_short: Post-apocalyptic pixel art survival RPG—offline play and turn-based battles.
